capabilities.name: test_cell_top_level_imports_without_error
capabilities.description: The cell top-level __init__ must import without raising.

capabilities.name: test_cell_entry_exposes_public_contracts
capabilities.description: Public contracts must be reachable from the cell entry.

capabilities.name: test_internal_modules_import_without_error
capabilities.description: Internal sub-modules must import without raising.

capabilities.name: test_engine_registry_singleton_accessible
capabilities.description: EngineRegistry must be reachable from internal.

capabilities.name: test_task_classifier_singleton_accessible
capabilities.description: TaskClassifier must be reachable from internal.

capabilities.name: test_engine_budget_from_dict_partial
capabilities.description: Partial dict should fill in defaults for missing keys.

capabilities.name: test_engine_context_requires_workspace_role_task
capabilities.description: All three required fields must be provided.

capabilities.name: test_base_engine_check_budget_allows_few_errors
capabilities.description: _check_budget returns True when consecutive errors < threshold.

capabilities.name: test_base_engine_check_budget_blocks_many_errors
capabilities.description: _check_budget returns False when consecutive errors >= threshold.

capabilities.name: test_base_engine_call_llm_returns_empty_when_no_caller
capabilities.description: _call_llm returns empty string when no llm_caller injected (testability).

capabilities.name: _DummyEngine
capabilities.description: Minimal concrete BaseEngine for testing registry.

capabilities.name: test_engine_registry_register_same_strategy_twice
capabilities.description: Re-registering the same strategy should be idempotent (not raise).

capabilities.name: test_engine_registry_get_returns_cached_instance
capabilities.description: Multiple calls to get() should return the same object.

capabilities.name: test_engine_registry_register_with_kwargs
capabilities.description: register() passes kwargs to the engine constructor.

capabilities.name: test_register_engine_convenience
capabilities.description: register_engine() convenience function should register on global registry.

capabilities.name: test_get_engine_convenience
capabilities.description: get_engine() convenience function should retrieve from global registry.

capabilities.name: test_get_engine_registry_is_singleton
capabilities.description: Two calls return the same registry object.

capabilities.name: test_global_registry_cleared_between_tests
capabilities.description: Each test should work with a clean global registry.

methods.name: test_engine_strategy_property_not_present
methods.doc: HybridEngine does not inherit from BaseEngine; it orchestrates them.

methods.name: test_should_switch_at_high_step_count
methods.doc: Results near budget limit should trigger switching.

methods.name: test_should_not_switch_when_under_budget
methods.doc: Good results should not trigger switching.

methods.name: test_run_creates_context_when_none_provided
methods.doc: run() should create EngineContext when context=None.

methods.name: test_run_with_explicit_strategy
methods.doc: run() should use the explicitly provided strategy.

methods.name: test_can_continue_stops_when_plan_exhausted_in_executing
methods.doc: When in executing phase and plan index >= plan length, cannot continue.

methods.name: test_parse_plan_response_fallback_to_numbered_lines
methods.doc: Non-JSON plan text should fall back to line-based extraction.

capabilities.name: TestPlanSolveExecutePhase
capabilities.description: _executing_step edge case: empty plan immediately returns COMPLETED.

capabilities.name: TestReActJSONParsing
capabilities.description: 4-pass JSON parsing — tested in isolation via _parse_response.

methods.name: test_parse_response_with_preamble
methods.doc: Parsing should succeed even with text before the JSON.

methods.name: test_parse_malformed_json_falls_back_to_partial
methods.doc: Invalid JSON should fall back to partial regex extraction.

methods.name: test_parse_totally_invalid_returns_default
methods.doc: Completely unparseable input should return a default finish response.

capabilities.name: TestReActFindMatchingBracket
capabilities.description: Bracket matching for balanced JSON extraction.

methods.name: test_extract_balanced_nested
methods.doc: Balanced-bracket extraction finds the outermost matching braces.

methods.name: test_execute_nonempty_task_succeeds
methods.doc: Non-empty task should always succeed (single-shot, no failure path).

capabilities.name: TestSequentialAdapterPromptBuilding
capabilities.description: Sequential adapter prompt building via execute path.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_assigns_react_to_explore_task
capabilities.description: ReAct patterns like '分析' should boost REACT score.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_assigns_plan_solve_to_implement_task
capabilities.description: '实现' keyword should boost Plan-Solve score.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_assigns_tot_to_design_task
capabilities.description: '设计' in '设计系统架构' should boost ToT score.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_assigns_sequential_to_execute_task
capabilities.description: '运行' keyword should boost Sequential score.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_all_strategies_get_minimum_score
capabilities.description: Every strategy should receive at least 0.1 even without matching keywords.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_context_can_boost_score
capabilities.description: Context dict can influence scoring via _adjust_by_context.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_classify_returns_engine_strategy
capabilities.description: classify() returns the EngineStrategy enum, not a string.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_classify_with_context
capabilities.description: Context dict should be passed through.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_classify_empty_task
capabilities.description: Empty task should still return a valid strategy, not raise.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_adjust_by_context_complexity_high
capabilities.description: complexity=high should boost ToT and REACT scores.

capabilities.name: test_classify_task_convenience
capabilities.description: classify_task() function should delegate to classifier.

capabilities.name: test_get_task_classifier_is_same_instance
capabilities.description: Calling twice returns the same object (module-level singleton).

capabilities.name: test_classifier_get_reason_returns_string
capabilities.description: get_reason should return a non-empty explanation.

capabilities.name: test_classifier_get_reason_reflects_task
capabilities.description: Different tasks should produce potentially different reasons.

capabilities.name: TestThoughtBranch
capabilities.description: ThoughtBranch dataclass — requires `id` as first positional arg.

methods.name: test_engine_has_empty_branches_dict
methods.doc: Branches are stored as a dict[str, ThoughtBranch].

methods.name: test_engine_max_branches_capped_at_10
methods.doc: max_branches is capped at 10 to prevent resource exhaustion.

capabilities.name: TestToTPruning
capabilities.description: _prune_branches — takes no arguments, uses instance pruning_threshold.

methods.name: test_prune_branches_prunes_below_threshold
methods.doc: Branches with score below threshold get PRUNED status.
